Skill Path: Showmanship

Your performances are awe-inspiring and fascinating.

While developing your skills in Performance you chose to focus specifically on Showmanship, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4UXyMtXLaOxuH6Js]{Distracting Performance}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform}.
